architecture.summary: Single-page workspace with left rail, 5 panels, useSkillWorkspace shared hook, ephemeral state with URL panel param, last-write-wins save

integrations.summary: Existing eval-server REST API + SSE streaming, new PUT /api/skills/:plugin/:skill/content endpoint, reuses existing improve/benchmark/history/stats APIs

ui-ux.summary: 48px icon-only left rail, instant panel swap with fade-in, 1024px min viewport, Ctrl+1-5 panel shortcuts, Ctrl+S save, Ctrl+Enter run, dirty indicator in header, no warning dialogs on panel switch

performance.summary: Simple scrollable list for test cases (2-15 max), no virtualization needed, single-user local dev tool

security.summary: N/A - local dev tool, single user, no auth, no PII, no rate limiting needed

edge-cases.summary: One benchmark at a time with reject message, dirty editor state preserved silently across panel switches, last-write-wins for file saves
